title: SlowUT
description: Completely customize your arm swing speeds for mining, block placing, eating, and more with a clean tabbed configuration menu.
body:
SlowUT: Ultimate Arm Animation Control
SlowUT is a lightweight client-side mod that gives you total control over your player's arm swing speed. Whether you want a more cinematic feel to your gameplay or need to fine-tune animations for specific actions, SlowUT provides a professional-grade solution.

✨ Key Features:
🎯 Action-Specific Tuning: Independently adjust the swing strength for Mining, Block Placing, Eating/Drinking, XP Bottles, Ender Pearls, and End Crystals.

🛠️ Tabbed Configuration: A clean, user-friendly menu (powered by Cloth Config) featuring "Main" and "Tuning" tabs for easy navigation.

🔒 Anti-Spam Logic: Unlike basic mods, SlowUT features custom logic that keeps your animations smooth and slow, even if you are jitter-clicking or spamming items.

⚡ Master Switch: Use the "Everything Slow" toggle to instantly apply your global settings to every action in the game.

🌍 Universal Compatibility: Works on any server! Since it only affects your local animations, it is 100% client-side safe.

Requires Fabric API and Cloth Config API.
